services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive software solutions from strategy to launch

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A proven process that turns ideas into shipped products

steps.title: Discovery
steps.body: We learn your goals, constraints, and audience. Stakeholder interviews, competitor analysis, and technical scoping in one focused sprint.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Rapid prototyping and a design system built to scale. Every decision is tested against real user flows before a line of code is written.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Clean, tested code shipped in two-week iterations. CI/CD from day one, transparent progress, and zero surprises at launch.

steps.title: Launch & Grow
steps.body: We deploy, monitor, and iterate. Performance baselines, error tracking, and ongoing support until you're confident and thriving.

meta.title: About — Codezeen
meta.description: Meet the team behind Codezeen — a software agency built on craft and care.

about.title: About Codezeen
about.subtitle: Who we are and what drives us

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: We exist to help ambitious businesses ship software that works beautifully. No shortcuts, no bloat — just clean code and thoughtful design.

items.title: Craft
items.body: We obsess over the details others skip. Every pixel, every function, every edge case.

items.title: Speed
items.body: Fast iteration, not rushed code. We ship early and often without sacrificing quality.

items.title: Honesty
items.body: Transparent timelines, honest estimates, and hard truths delivered with respect.

items.title: Impact
items.body: We measure success by your results — not our deliverables.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Codezeen is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or engage our services.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, company name, and project details when you fill out our contact form. We also collect basic usage data (pages visited, time on site) through privacy-respecting analytics to improve our website.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information solely to respond to your inquiry, scope your project, and communicate about our services. We never sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body: All data transmitted through our website is encrypted via HTTPS. Contact form submissions are sent securely via Resend. We retain your contact information only as long as necessary to fulfill your request or maintain our business relationship.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please reach out to us at codezeeen@gmail.com. We will respond within 48 hours.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing Codezeen's website or engaging our services, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully before proceeding.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By using this website or signing a service agreement with Codezeen, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Services Description
sections.body: Codezeen provides custom software development, UI/UX design, mobile application development, SaaS product development, and related technology consulting services. The specific scope, deliverables, and timeline of each engagement are defined in individual project agreements.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.body: Payment terms are outlined in each project's service agreement. Typically, projects require an upfront deposit before work begins, with remaining payments tied to agreed milestones. All invoices are due within 14 days of issuance unless otherwise stated.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: Upon receipt of full payment, all custom work product created specifically for your project becomes your property. Codezeen retains the right to display the work in our portfolio unless a separate non-disclosure agreement is in place. We retain ownership of any proprietary tools, frameworks, or components developed independently.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Codezeen's liability under any engagement is limited to the fees paid for that specific project. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. We make no warranties beyond those explicitly stated in the project agreement.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.body: For questions about these terms or to discuss a project agreement, contact us at codezeeen@gmail.com. Changes to these terms will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
